title: Google renames NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook and adds integration with third-party apps
summary: Google's AI-powered note-taking tool adopts the Gemini name as part of the reorganization of its services.

title: OpenAI presents Codex Micro, its first hardware device: an RGB macropad with joystick to control AI agents
summary: The device features 13 programmable keys and a joystick that allows developers to interact with their AI agents without using the keyboard.

title: RPCS3 emulator manages to run 75% of PlayStation 3 games on PC
summary: The open-source emulator continues to improve as Sony prepares to close the PlayStation 3 and PS Vita digital store in 2027.

title: MSI and Lenovo launch the first monitors and laptops with inkjet-printed OLED displays
summary: Both the MSI monitor and the Lenovo laptop use panels manufactured with TCL CSOT's IJP technology that reduces costs and improves image quality.

title: AMD Ryzen 7 7700X3D arrives as a Newegg exclusive with lower performance than the 7800X3D
summary: The processor is only available at Newegg in North America and according to early tests, its performance is lower than the 7800X3D at a similar price.

title: TSMC to invest another $100 billion in new semiconductor factories in Arizona
summary: The Taiwanese giant's plan includes the construction of at least four state-of-the-art plants in Arizona with an additional total investment of $100 billion.

title: OnePlus ceases operations in the United States and Europe
summary: The Chinese company confirms its exit from international markets to focus on Asia.

title: Menstrual tracking apps share health data without users' consent
summary: A Mozilla investigation discovers that the Stardust app sends sensitive data to analytics firms, while other similar apps also pose privacy risks.

title: Spotify expands supervised accounts for kids to free users and more countries
summary: Parents can now create accounts for their children at no cost and control the content and activity of the little ones.

title: Kimi presents the open AI model K3 that matches the performance of GPT-5.6 Sol and Claude Fable 5
summary: Kimi's new open language model matches the capabilities of the most advanced proprietary systems and marks a milestone for Chinese AI.

title: Two hackers from the Scattered Spider group sentenced to five and a half years for the London Underground attack
summary: The cybercriminals, aged 19 and 20, were arrested by British police and sentenced for computer fraud and data theft.

title: SpaceX abruptly aborts the second launch of Starship V3 after ignition
summary: SpaceX's rocket failed to take off for reasons not yet specified and is under technical review.

title: Coca-Cola suspends production at its Fairlife dairy plant after a ransomware cyberattack
summary: The cyberattack exclusively affected the dairy production plant and did not spread to other company systems.

title: Uber acquires Delivery Hero's delivery business for $14.8 billion
summary: The acquisition of Delivery Hero's delivery division will allow Uber to expand its presence in the global food delivery market.

title: Nvidia and Japan build the world's first national AI infrastructure with more than 27,000 GPUs
summary: The Noetra consortium will build a data center with 27,500 Nvidia Rubin GPUs to boost AI research and development in Japan.

title: Elon Musk invested one billion dollars in a power plant to supply his AI company, xAI
summary: The acquisition of APR Energy provides Musk's AI company with an electricity generation capacity of more than one gigawatt.

title: Nobel laureate Demis Hassabis warns about the risk of losing control of artificial intelligence
summary: The founder of DeepMind and Nobel laureate expresses his concern about the lack of safeguards in the development of advanced artificial intelligence systems.

title: Germany applies media law to AI-generated summaries from Google and Perplexity in a pioneering decision
summary: The judicial decision sets a precedent by equating AI-generated summaries with traditional editorial content in regulatory terms.

title: Scientists discover a new species of monkey in the Congo Basin
summary: The primate, named 'Likweli', was found in the Congolese rainforest and joins the monkey species discovered in the last decade.

title: Starlink renews its residential antenna to solve the size and consumption issues of the previous generation
summary: Elon Musk's company redesigns its satellite terminal to make it more compact and efficient, addressing user complaints.
